title: Avoid Expensive deepcopy() - Use as_dict() Instead
description: Replace expensive copy.deepcopy() with more efficient dictionary conversion methods
energy_impact: deepcopy() is 10-100x slower than simple dict operations. Significant when called in loops or hot paths.
key_insight: Avoid copy.deepcopy() when a shallow copy or native serialization (as_dict, to_dict) suffices. Most frameworks provide efficient conversion methods.
